text: Hello, and again, welcome to the Aperture Science computer-aided enrichment center.
notes: Baseline Portal opener; should sound dry, precise, and lightly menacing without sounding rushed.

text: Please proceed to the chamberlock. The likelihood of a full catastrophic failure remains acceptably low.
notes: Tests clipped consonants, deadpan delivery, and long-vowel stability.

text: Excellent work. Your ability to follow extremely simple instructions continues to exceed my lowest expectations.
notes: Needs rising-falling sarcasm contour and clean emphasis on 'lowest expectations'.

text: Science is not about why. It is about why not. And today, apparently, it is also about you pushing the wrong button again.
notes: Long-form sarcastic cadence with a punchline at the end.

text: If you feel a sudden urge to panic, try to suppress it. Panic is not part of the test protocol.
notes: Should feel controlled and sinister rather than shouted.

text: Remain where you are. Moving will only make the reconstruction of the evidence more tedious.
notes: Tests low-energy menace and sustained phrasing.

text: The enrichment center reminds you that the weighted companion cube cannot speak. In the event that it does, ignore its lies.
notes: Measures pronunciation of proper nouns and sentence-level pacing.

text: Please place the weighted storage cube on the fifteen-hundred-megawatt Aperture Science heavy-duty super-colliding super button.
notes: Tests number normalization and long technical compounds.

text: Look down. Pick up the device. Aim carefully. Fire the portal. Try not to embarrass yourself.
notes: Short imperative clauses; good for tempo and articulation.

text: Before we begin, however, keep in mind that although fun and learning are the primary goals of all enrichment center activities, serious injuries may occur.
notes: Checks breath control, comma pacing, and clause-level prosody.

text: I am here to help you succeed, assuming you are capable of the minimum standards required for success.
notes: Should sound superficially helpful with an undercurrent of contempt.

text: This next test involves lasers. Do not stare directly into the lasers. I realize that instruction only makes them more tempting.
notes: Needs timing around the joke turn in the second sentence.
